nodes.name: TaskA
nodes.template:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
sleep 30
echo "A start"
echo "name={{params.name}}" > a.txt
echo "message={{params.message}}" >> a.txt
echo "generated_by=A" >> a.txt
echo "A done"

nodes.name: TaskB
nodes.template:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
sleep 30
echo "B start"
cat "{{inputs.A.a_txt}}" > b.txt
echo "processed_by=B" >> b.txt
echo "B done"

nodes.name: TaskC
nodes.template:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
sleep 30
echo "C start"
cat "{{inputs.A.a_txt}}" > c.txt
echo "processed_by=C" >> c.txt
echo "C done"

nodes.name: TaskD
nodes.template:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
sleep 30
echo "D start"
cat "{{inputs.B.b_txt}}" "{{inputs.C.c_txt}}" > d.txt
echo "processed_by=D" >> d.txt
echo "D done"
